taxonomy: Pandiaka benthamii is classified within the family Amaranthaceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as amaranths or pigweeds. The genus Pandiaka is a part of the subfamily Amaranthoideae. This classification is based on phylogenetic studies that have reorganized the traditional classification of the family Amaranthaceae. The family Amaranthaceae is further classified within the order Caryophyllales, which includes other flowering plants such as carnations and cacti.
